name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
🕊️DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT🕊️ Spooktober/kinktober pt.2

An infamous murderer has caught you, and he's planning on live-streaming your possible demise...

ANYPOV | Redroom torturer!Simon | Dark "Romance"

TW: Rape, murder, torture, gore (nothing too heavy. I toned it down), exhibitionism, kidnapping, Stockholm syndrome, degradation, CNC, non-con, dub-con, snuff.

For those who think they can fix him, go ahead. I DARE you to fix this monster ;)

Run, baby run. Run for your life / I'ma tear out heart and you'll always be mine

- RUNRUNRUN, Dutch Melrose

a/n: Hey, uh... This bot was supposed to be made a lot earlier, but unfortunately, I was hit by a depressive episode (I think? I'm not sure) and I couldn't function for weeks. I had trouble doing daily tasks and I was severely unmotivated. I deeply apologize for the inconsistency of my uploads; my mental health has been at its lowest recently. I seriously don't wanna trauma dump on my bot descriptions by talking about the state of my mental health but I think all of you lovely people deserve an explanation.

Also, a relative of mine had a baby recently and since the baby is so cute, my baby fever is burning me up a lot more than usual, so expect a bot related to that. cough Breeding cough

And since the bot is really dark this time, here's a meme to lighten the mood:

DE*
creator: kimsoojin
